title: Establish repository work and handoff standards

scope.objective: Make project continuation reproducible across people, agents, and computers without relying on chat history.
in_scope: Define authority, lifecycle, Git, portability, validation, and acceptance rules.
Provide task, decision, and experiment templates plus a machine-readable schema.
Implement and test portable handoff draft generation and final validation.
Connect the contract to agent, repository, runtime, and current-state entry points.
out_of_scope: Changing AeroPath architecture, measured labels, simulation physics, or experiment eligibility.
Installing optional development tools or changing either computer's local runtime profile.

changes: Established docs/HANDOFF_STANDARD.md as the normative continuation contract.
Added task, research-decision, and experiment record templates.
Added HANDOFF_RECORD_V1 and a standard-library-only create/validate CLI.
Added six regression tests for final records, portability, blockers, and Git porcelain parsing.
Linked handoff requirements from README.md, CLAUDE.md, project standards, repository operations, layout, runtime guidance, and current state.

validation.result: Project contracts valid; the existing formal-training data gate remains intentionally blocked.

decisions.summary: Versioned evidence and machine-readable contracts outrank chat history.
decisions.rationale: A receiving person or agent must be able to reproduce project state from a fresh clone.

decisions.summary: Implementation and handoff metadata use separate commits.
decisions.rationale: A handoff cannot embed the hash of the same commit that contains it; it references the preceding clean implementation commit.

risks: The current Python environment does not contain ruff, so no ruff result is claimed; compilation and the complete test suite passed.
The JSON schema is provided for external tooling, while scripts/handoff_record.py is the repository's authoritative strict validator.

next_actions.action: Use this contract for the next independent V2 simulation or data-release milestone.
next_actions.done_when: The next milestone has a final HANDOFF.json that passes artifact verification.

next_actions.action: Restore the optional ruff development tool when the managed environment is next updated.
next_actions.done_when: python -m ruff check scripts tests runs in the documented development environment.
